negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_160
prompt: The video opens in an indoor gymnasium-like area with a polished wooden floor and cream-colored walls adorned with Olympic rings. A volleyball net is visible in the background, along with a bench against the wall and a small white heater unit. Four individuals are present: three players completely visible and the fourth one partially visible moving during the first few frames, all wearing athletic attire and accents on their sleeves. The player in black athletic wear with lemony shoes is captured mid-air, diving to hit a volleyball that is just about to touch the ground. His body is stretched horizontally, with one leg extended upward and the other bent at the knee. The player in the gray long-sleeve shirt and blue shorts stands slightly behind, watching attentively as she slowly starts to move in. Another player in black athletic attire with blue accents on his sleeves is positioned further back, leaning forward with knees bent, ready to react.  As the sequence progresses, the player in black athletic wear continues his dive, extending both his arms as he hits the volleyball while his right leg remains elevated. The player in gray clothing shifts slightly, moving into a more active stance, and the third player in black athletic attire and blue accents lowers himself closer to the ground, maintaining a forward-leaning posture. The volleyball bounces as it gets hit by the person wearing lemony shoes and moves out of the frame, indicating it has been passed or served, and the players' movements suggest they are engaged in a defensive drill or practice session. The scene concludes with the player in black athletic wear still diving, his body fully extended, while the others observe his movement.
